# manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm { #spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm }

`manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm`



## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ForecasterRecursiveLGBM](#spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm.ForecasterRecursiveLGBM) | ForecasterRecursive specialization using LightGBM. |

### ForecasterRecursiveLGBM { #spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm.ForecasterRecursiveLGBM }

```python
manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm.ForecasterRecursiveLGBM(
    iteration,
    lags=12,
    **kwargs,
)
```

ForecasterRecursive specialization using LightGBM.

#### Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_lgbm import ForecasterRecursiveLGBM
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_model import ForecasterRecursiveModel
>>> model = ForecasterRecursiveLGBM(iteration=0)
>>> model.name
'lgbm'
>>> isinstance(model, ForecasterRecursiveModel)
True
>>> model.forecaster is not None
True
```
